overview: Frost Sentinel is a Normal-class Construct/Spirit/Elemental monster found in Ice Abyss. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 150 HP, 0 physical damage, 0 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Cold Blast Chain at 160% ratio (0 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Cold Blast Chain.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire, Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500), Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Cold Blast Chain
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Cold Blast Chain. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Cold Blast Chain

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
